src/main/java/com/test/ordering/applicat._comment: Command record must have List<OrderLineSnapshot> field from eventDtos (application.dtos.incoming), NOT a domain VO or Request wrapper.

src/main/java/com/test/ordering/infrastr._comment: Listener must extract List<OrderLineSnapshot> via constructCollectionType, pass only to command, no dead orderId/buyerId extractions.

src/main/java/com/test/ordering/applicat._comment: OrderLineSnapshot declared as eventDto in the consumer BC — generates as a Java record in application.dtos.incoming (not domain.valueobject).

src/main/java/com/test/sales/domain/valu._comment: OrderLineSnapshot still exists in the producer BC as a proper domain VO.
